summary: Tested appointment status update and history features. All backend endpoints exist and respond correctly (7/7 tests passed). Code review confirms all requested features are implemented: 1) PUT /api/appointments/{id}/status endpoint for status updates, 2) GET /api/prescription-manager/user/{user_id}/appointments for history, 3) Status menu (MoreVertical icon) on HomePage appointment cards, 4) Done/Postponed/Abandoned options in status menu, 5) upcomingAppointments filter only shows status='upcoming', 6) Hospital Name field is optional (no 'required' attribute), 7) Previous Consultations/Lab Tests history displayed in booking modals with date, name, and status badge.

findings: ✅ Endpoint exists at line 1233-1258 in server.py
✅ Endpoint exists at line 1260-1285 in server.py
✅ Returns appointments sorted by date descending
✅ Uses PUT with status as query parameter
✅ Uses GET with limit as query parameter
✅ MoreVertical, Check, XIcon, RotateCcw icons imported (line 5)
✅ activeStatusMenu state for tracking open menu (line 26)
✅ Status menu button with MoreVertical icon (lines 594-600)
✅ Each option has correct color styling (green/orange/red)
✅ When status is updated to done/postponed/abandoned, appointment disappears from list
✅ Hospital Name input does NOT have 'required' attribute
✅ Doctor Name, Date, Time fields have 'required' attribute
✅ hospitalName sent as null if empty (line 1989)
✅ handleBookDoctor fetches history and filters for type='doctor' (lines 226-239)
✅ handleBookLabTest fetches history and filters for type='lab' (lines 242-258)
✅ Lab modal shows 'Previous Lab Tests' header (line 2123)
✅ History displays: doctor/lab name, date, status badge (lines 1959-1974, 2125-2140)
✅ Status badge colors: green=done, orange=postponed, red=abandoned, blue=upcoming

critical_code_review_comments: All requested features are correctly implemented
Status update flow: Click three dots → Select status → API call → Refresh appointments → Appointment removed from Upcoming section
Hospital Name is properly optional with visual indicator and no required attribute
Booking history correctly filters by appointment type (doctor/lab) and displays with status badges

success_rate.frontend: 100% (code review passed, Google OAuth required for E2E)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Appointment status update and history features are fully implemented. To manually test: 1) Login as user, 2) Go to HomePage, 3) If you have upcoming appointments, click the three dots icon on any appointment card, 4) Select Done/Postponed/Abandoned, 5) Verify appointment disappears from Upcoming section. For Prescription Manager: 1) Login as admin (diabexpertonline@gmail.com), 2) Go to /prescription-manager, 3) Click Stethoscope icon to book doctor consultation, 4) Verify 'Previous Consultations' section shows history with status badges, 5) Verify Hospital Name field is optional, 6) Click Flask icon to book lab test, 7) Verify 'Previous Lab Tests' section shows history.
